title: Natural Sciences Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities in such fields as life sciences, physical sciences, mathematics, statistics, and research and development in these fields.

tasks.text: Hire, supervise, or evaluate engineers, technicians, researchers, or other staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or coordinate successive phases of problem analysis, solution proposals, or testing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or direct research, development, or production activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review project activities and prepare and review research, testing, or operational reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with scientists, engineers, regulators, or others to plan or review projects or to provide technical assistance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop client relationships and communicate with clients to explain proposals, present research findings, establish specifications, or discuss project status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine scientific or technical goals within broad outlines provided by top management and make detailed plans to accomplish these goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or implement policies, standards, or procedures for the architectural, scientific, or technical work performed to ensure regulatory compliance or operations enhancement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit personnel or oversee the development or maintenance of staff competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and administer budgets, approve and review expenditures, and prepare financial reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct own research in field of expertise.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop innovative technology or train staff for its implementation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Make presentations at professional meetings to further knowledge in the field.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide for stewardship of plant or animal resources or habitats, studying land use, monitoring animal populations, or providing shelter, resources, or medical treatment for animals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise or assist in obtaining patents or meeting other legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
